string.name: perm_internet_reason
string.value: Required for syncing with Zotero cloud service and downloading metadata

string.name: perm_network_info_reason
string.value: Required to detect network availability for sync operations

string.name: perm_background_reason
string.value: Required for background file sync and auto-sync timer

string.name: perm_read_media_reason
string.value: Required to import PDF attachments from device storage

string.name: perm_write_media_reason
string.value: Required to export library data and save attachments

string.name: perm_download_reason
string.value: Required to download file attachments during sync

string.name: perm_file_persist_reason
string.value: Required to maintain file access across sessions for linked attachments

string.name: perm_bundle_dir_reason
string.value: Required for local database and configuration file storage

string.name: perm_pasteboard_reason
string.value: Required for Copy Citation and Quick Copy functionality

string.name: perm_notification_reason
string.value: Required to show sync progress and error notifications

string.name: perm_vibrate_reason
string.value: Required for haptic feedback on long-press actions
